# Guidebook for Accessible Design

**Part:** Front Matter  
**Generated by:** `scripts/generate_parts.py` (A.12 reassembly, stub-capable)  
**Source DB fingerprint:** `f623191bb583`

---


## About

A reference on architecture, accessibility, and the built environment, organised around designing with dignity for disabled people. Accessibility throughout refers to inclusion of persons with disabilities.

## Section Map

|---|---|
| Part 1 | Foundations of Accessible Design |
| Part 2 | Disability Categories |

## Abbreviations

DD — Design Development · RFO — Ready for Occupancy · BPC — Best Practice Compendium · Co-1 — co-primary (lived-experience) evidence · DAR — Design for Adaptable Readiness.
